rationale: Secondary read preference fails when no primary; connectivity/routing implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
db.collection() doesn't return error with safe:true; pre-spec API behavior change, no spec rule involved.
Race condition in CursorStream pause/resume logic; internal implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Documentation errors in db.collection() docs; docs bug with no spec involvement.
Auth not re-established after replica set primary failover; no specific auth spec rule cited as violated.
Kerberos/GSSAPI auth bug; empty description, insufficient detail to classify.
GridStore writeFile callback fires prematurely on large files; implementation bug, no GridFS spec rule contradicted.
Feature request for different SPN in Kerberos auth; empty description, no spec rule violated.
Support SASL PLAIN auth; empty description, feature addition not a spec deviation.
Tailable cursor with awaitData causes high CPU; performance bug, no spec rule violated.
save() fails to detect _id:0 and inserts instead of upserts; internal save() logic bug without a clear specific spec rule.
Replica set connection hangs when secondary creates index; connectivity/timeout implementation bug.
Data compaction on secondary causes client to hang; connection handling improvement, no spec rule violated.
Null dereference in auth when server in STARTUP2 state; error handling bug, no specific auth spec rule contradicted.
Uncaught error (null dereference) when auth against compacting server; internal error handling bug.
Failed connections remain open after exception; connection pool resource management bug.
Markdown code blocks not parsed in docs website; documentation rendering issue.
Native BSON extension fails to load on Windows x64; build/packaging issue.
Markdown error in documentation page; docs bug only.
dbStats and other commands ignore readPreference; server selection spec requires commands respect the specified read preference.
HA reconnect loop every 30 seconds due to socketTimeout on idle connection; internal reconnect implementation bug.
hint option only accepted as Object, rejecting string index names; spec requires string hints be honored.
Subsequent queries hang silently after user exception in callback; internal error swallowing regression.
find() hangs indefinitely when server goes down; timeout propagation issue, not a spec deviation.
Extended JSON fields ($oid, $date) rejected on insert; Extended JSON import not a BSON spec conformance issue.
Connection timeout regression introduced in 1.3.20; version regression bug, no spec rule contradicted.
HISTORY file missing 1.3.20 changelog section; release notes/docs issue.
Use of const in strict mode causes SyntaxError; JavaScript compatibility/language issue.
Tailable cursor on oplog ignores skip() and sort(); oplog-specific cursor behavior, not covered by spec.
Version 1.3.20 missing from NPM registry; release/packaging issue.
Cursor.nextObject() callback called twice after reconnect; internal retry/callback bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Update queries reject $elemMatch and dotted field names; BSON key validation incorrectly applied to query operators.
Unix domain socket connections unsupported; missing feature, not a spec conformance violation.
Missing module './collection/shared' crash on Heroku; build/packaging/deployment issue.
SSL error in server logs when Node.js driver connects; SSL handshake implementation issue.
pkFactory option misnamed as pk; API naming/docs bug, no spec coverage.
Cursor stream missing .pipe (Node ReadStream interface); Node.js stream API compliance, not a MongoDB spec issue.
Log warning when ignoring user read preference; logging improvement, no spec nonconformance.
Clone of NODE-104; same build/packaging crash on Heroku.
db.open() with non-existent Mongos hosts doesn't fire error callback; connection error handling bug.
readPreference variable dropped in Mongos sharded replicaset connect_options; server selection spec requires honoring read preference.
Cursor tailable/awaitData options check != null instead of boolean; API quirk without a specific spec rule violated.
Driver re-throws user callback exceptions on process; internal error propagation/swallowing bug.
find() mutates the options argument object; undocumented side-effect, not a spec deviation.
GridStore.write() close parameter lost in refactoring; regression from code refactor, no spec rule cited.
Null dereference when error.documents is null in update callback; internal error handling bug.
Feature request to support Node domain module; Node.js API integration improvement, no spec involvement.
canCheckoutReader blocks all reads from arbiters; server selection spec permits reads from direct arbiter connections.
User calls getProfilingStatus command incorrectly; support question/user error, no driver bug.
Request for reconnect log messages; logging improvement feature request, no spec involvement.
